meta.comment: v0.1 (P0 bootstrap, Anthropic-only). Frozen historical artifact. Originally shipped with a tier-keyed schema ({strong, medium, weak}) plus a bench_to_deployed map; rewritten here in the v0.2+ flat schema so the same Go loader handles every committed bundle. The rankings.json scores are unchanged: claude-opus-4-7's row was trained from the average of gpt-5 + gemini-2.5-pro columns, so the proxy below is recorded as gpt-5 (the dominant column) for documentation only — the trained row is what argmax actually reads. Re-running training on this registry would regenerate rankings; we don't, because v0.1 is frozen for comparison purposes.

deployed_models.proxy_note: v0.1 trained this row from the average of the gpt-5 and gemini-2.5-pro columns. Recorded as gpt-5 (the dominant column) for the new flat schema; rankings.json values are unchanged from the original training run
no claude-haiku column in OpenRouterBench; gemini-2.5-flash stood in as the cheapest small-tier proxy
